title: Tails&Trails
description: It's for furry community, adds ears & tails for many animals. Using CIT features.
body:
**Future Updates/Plans**
- Different fur colors
- Adding More animals
- Bedrock Support
- Maybe Elf/Goblin Ears

**Introduction:** I’m a pixel-artist/3d-modeler with 3-4 years of experience, and have a similar art style to Noxcrew and Mojang. If you plan on reusing this assets for your own private or public resource packs is allowed, all I ask is credit must be given where it's due.

**Information/Description:** It's for furry community, adds ears & tails for many animals [Future Update]. Using CIT Respawn Support. I'm got the idea for the name from the Minecraft update the the creatvity and stories of the fursonas. It's a second you, an adeventure to find yourself and who you are. Alought I find it bit werid, ngtl I support being yourself and having the freedom of expresstion. **_Joke: Just don't bite me..._**

MissGhoul: Tails & Trails is heavily Inspirated by missghoul's cit pack fox tail and ears. I learned that fox tail is in the offhand, and when players walk almost has a wag to it!

My Discord Server: https://discord.gg/UgQwjgxDCN
